title: oxera morierei
intro: Oxera morierei, also known as the Tahitian oxeye daisy or Tahitian oxeye, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in digestion. Oxera morierei can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
